versions.changelog_entry: Initial CLI agent-readiness retrofit prompt. 10 items derived from scorecard audit against 'CLI Best Practices for AI Agents'. CRITICAL ordered foundation: JSON envelope helpers + global --output plumbing (item 1); stdout=data/stderr=logs sweep (item 2); semantic exit codes 0/1/2/3/4/5 with docs/EXIT_CODES.md (item 3). HIGH: commands --json self-discovery (item 4); Examples: blocks on every command (item 5); structured error envelope with code + suggestion (item 6); project SKILL.md at .claude/skills/forensics-cli/ mirrored to .cursor/skills/ (item 7). MEDIUM: --yes / --non-interactive enforcement on TUI and destructive commands (item 8); HTTP transient classification routed to exit 4 (item 9); existing-test updates (item 10). All changes are additive; text remains the default --output; no top-level command renamed.
